---
type: fact
situation: When building a command-line application in Go
subject: Item fields and standard command set
predicate: follow a recurring pattern across todo and bookmarks CLIs
object: 'Item fields: ID (int, auto-increment nextID), Title/URL string, Tags []string (deduplicated via slices.Contains before append), Status enum (todo/doing/done) or boolean active, Priority (low/med/high), CreatedAt time.Time, CompletedAt *time.Time (set on done), DueDate *time.Time (optional). Standard commands: add (with --tag, --priority/-p, --due flags), list (--tag filter, --json, --archived), search <q>, delete/remove <id>, edit/rename <id> <new-title>, tag <id> <tag>, start <id> (→ doing), archive (moves done items), stats (counts by status + completion rate + overdue), undo (restore pre-mutation snapshot).'
luhmann: "7"
created: "2026-05-30"
source: distilled L2 from build episodes
---

Information learned: when in building a command-line application in Go, Item fields and standard command set follow a recurring pattern across todo and bookmarks CLIs Item fields: ID (int, auto-increment nextID), Title/URL string, Tags []string (deduplicated via slices.Contains before append), Status enum (todo/doing/done) or boolean active, Priority (low/med/high), CreatedAt time.Time, CompletedAt *time.Time (set on done), DueDate *time.Time (optional). Standard commands: add (with --tag, --priority/-p, --due flags), list (--tag filter, --json, --archived), search <q>, delete/remove <id>, edit/rename <id> <new-title>, tag <id> <tag>, start <id> (→ doing), archive (moves done items), stats (counts by status + completion rate + overdue), undo (restore pre-mutation snapshot)..



**Accumulated (bookmarks):** Accumulated from bookmarks build: the open <id> command (look up by id, call the injected openURL, print 'Opening <url>'); multi-word rename via strings.Join(args[1:], ' '); undo/archive/stats/status/priority are todo-specific — the canonical command set is a superset, not universal to every domain.
